Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: broken pediments [300002732], pediments [300002726], wall components by location or context [300165507], wall components [300002573], walls and wall components [300052367], enclosing structural elements [300078050], structural elements [300078048], structural elements and components for structural elements [300078046], architectural elements [300000885], components by specific context [300241584], components (objects parts) [300241583], Components (hierarchy name) [300241490], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Broken pediments both in furniture and architecture, with s-shaped sides terminating in inwardly facing scrolls and separated at the center point often by a finial or urn.

Zowel op meubilair als in de architectuur aangetroffen gebroken frontons met S-vormige zijden die eindigen in naar binnen gerichte krullen en in het middelpunt vaak worden gescheiden door een fioel of urn.
傢飾及建築中的開口三角牆，雙側為S型且有向內彎曲的渦卷飾邊，中央通常以尖頂飾或甕形飾作為分隔點。

Source.Source_ID: 2000020951/Ware and Stafford, Illustrated Dictionary of Ornament (1974)
2000020951/Ware and Stafford, Illustrated Dictionary of Ornament (1974)
2000011151/Fleming and Honour, Penguin Dictionary of the Decorative Arts (1989)
2000045215/Yates, King, and Bridge. Encyclopedia of Furniture (1997)
